# 1 in 56 Million (Am I Israel?)

> An independent research project exploring the British-Israelite tradition —
> the claim that the royal line of King David never truly fell but continued
> through a hidden bloodline — and inviting visitors to investigate their own
> possible connection. The site presents a historical tradition and one
> researcher's independent analysis; it does not speak on behalf of any
> government.

## About

- Focus: the British-Israelite / Davidic-continuity tradition, the Coronation Stone (Stone of Scone), and related genealogical questions.
- Offering: a mailed research/investigation kit for interested participants (via the on-site form).
- Languages: English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese (each a full translated version toggled in-page).
- Stance: independent, non-governmental, presented as tradition + analysis rather than established fact.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://1in56million.org/): the central question, the historical timeline/waypoints, and the sign-up form to request a kit.

## Related initiatives

1 in 56 Million is one of six independent sibling nonprofit/research sites:

- [get-out-now.org](https://get-out-now.org/) — diaspora relocation / Law of Return guidance.
- [interfaith-sanctuary.org](https://interfaith-sanctuary.org/) — a non-denominational interfaith sanctuary.
- [thelastdate.org](https://thelastdate.org/) — nonprofit matchmaking initiative.
- [projectshreeram.org](https://projectshreeram.org/) — Hindu–Jewish and India–Israel relations.
- [crypto-jews.org](https://crypto-jews.org/) — Anusim / Converso community and Sephardic genealogy.
